description_long: This sculpture depicts a stylized human head and neck, mounted on a rectangular pedestal. The facial features are softly rendered, with a gentle downward tilt of the head, giving the figure a contemplative or serene expression. The hair is sculpted in a smooth, rounded mass that flows back from the forehead and covers the ears, with minimal textural detail. The neck is elongated and gracefully transitions into the base, which is solid and geometric. The overall form is smooth and simplified, with an emphasis on gentle curves and subtle anatomical suggestions. The sculpture appears to be made from a single, solid material, likely stone or plaster, and is monochromatic in color.
description: A smooth, stylized bust of a human head and neck on a rectangular pedestal, with soft facial features and a serene expression. The sculpture is monochromatic and emphasizes gentle curves and minimal detail.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the rounded back of the head and the smooth transition to the neck and pedestal, with no facial features visible.
description_view_1: Right profile view highlighting the elongated neck, the smooth hair mass, and the gentle slope of the nose and lips.
description_view_2: Frontal view displaying the softly rendered facial features, downward gaze, and symmetrical structure of the head and neck.
description_view_3: Left profile view similar to the right, showing the side of the face, the smooth hair, and the connection to the pedestal.
attribute_location_context: No visible environmental context; background is neutral and featureless.
